title: Paradox Candidate
description: JSON Schema for a candidate resource in the Paradox conversational AI recruiting platform. Candidates represent individuals progressing through automated screening, interview scheduling, and hiring workflows powered by the Olivia AI assistant.

OID.description: Unique internal candidate identifier assigned by Paradox

name.description: Full name of the candidate (required if first_name/last_name not provided)

first_name.description: First name of the candidate (use with last_name instead of name)

last_name.description: Last name of the candidate (use with first_name instead of name)

phone.description: Candidate phone number with country code

ex_id.description: External candidate identifier from an integrated system

ex_status.description: External status designation from an integrated system

ex_step.description: External step designation from an integrated system

ex_reason.description: External reason designation from an integrated system

job_req_id.description: Job requisition identifier the candidate is associated with

job_title.description: Job position title the candidate is applying for

job_loc_code.description: Job location code identifying the candidate work site

hirevue_instructions.description: Interview guidance text provided to the candidate

external_group_id.description: Group classification identifier for organizing candidates

referrer_email.description: Email address of the person who referred the candidate

referrer_name.description: Name of the person who referred the candidate

hiring_manager.description: Contact information for the assigned hiring manager

language_preference.description: Candidate language preference code (e.g. en, es, fr)

candidate_journey.description: Name of the journey workflow the candidate is enrolled in

candidate_journey_status.description: Current stage designation within the candidate journey

candidate_attribute_data.description: Custom candidate attributes as key-value pairs (values limited to 255 characters each)

use_application_id_for_identity.description: Whether to use the application ID to identify returning candidates

candidate_location_info.description: Geographic location information for the candidate

external_source_id.description: Source system identifier indicating where the candidate originated

offer_file_name.description: Filename of the attached offer letter document

use_paradox_status_map.description: Whether to enable Paradox status mapping

status_map_name.description: Paradox journey status name for status mapping

status_map_ex_id.description: External system status identifier for status mapping

talent_community.description: Whether the candidate is added to the talent pool

community_of_interest.description: Community identifier when talent_community is true

consent_to_marketing.description: Marketing consent status for the candidate
